name: Madecassoside
description: A highly purified component of Centella Asiatica that offers intense soothing benefits.
scientificSummary: One of the four main bioactive triterpenes in Centella Asiatica which stimulates collagen synthesis and suppresses inflammation.
mechanismOfAction: Regulates inflammation by modulating cytokine production and promotes skin regeneration.

seo.title: Madecassoside - Concentrated Skin Healing | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn about Madecassoside, the potent soothing agent for compromised skin.
